title: Write a GitLab CI Pipeline
description:
## Define Pipeline Stages

GitLab CI reads a YAML file that declares an ordered list of **`stages`** and jobs that each belong to a stage and run a **`script`**.

**Your task:** write a file at **`/root/gitlab-ci.yml`** that:
1. declares a top-level **`stages`** list containing at least **`build`** and **`test`**
2. defines at least one job with a **`stage`** and a **`script`**

> 💡 Validate the YAML with `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('/root/gitlab-ci.yml'))"`.

hints.title: Pipeline skeleton
hints.body: Declare the stages order, then jobs that reference a stage and run script commands.
hints.command:
printf 'stages:
  - build
  - test

build-job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo building

test-job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo testing
' > /root/gitlab-ci.yml

validation.description: Checks for a stages list with build and test, plus a job script.

commands.command: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('/root/gitlab-ci.yml')); s=d.get('stages'); print('ok' if isinstance(s,list) and 'build' in s and 'test' in s else 'no')"

commands.description: Defines at least one job script
